bullets: Designed a multi-dimensional Community Health Score combining engagement, quality, responsiveness, and risk signals
Applied NLP (sentiment, topic modeling) and behavioral metrics on Reddit, GitHub, and Stack Exchange data
Built an interactive dashboard surfacing declining, healthy, and at-risk communities for leadership decisions
Built and maintained Power BI dashboards tracking sales, operations, and customer KPIs
Automated recurring performance reports — reduced manual reporting effort by 30–40%
Generated insights driving stock planning, cost control, and loyalty campaigns through cross-functional collaboration
Streamlined KPI reporting workflows so stakeholders could make faster, data-driven decisions
Analyzed Amazon seller data to optimize ad spend — reduced ACOS by 20% in 3 months
Conducted market and competitor analysis supporting launch of 10 new self-care products
Identified product opportunities through data-driven research, contributing to 100% quarterly sales growth
